description_long: This is a modern ASUS laptop with a sleek, dark blue metallic finish and a prominent ASUS logo centered on the back of the display lid. The laptop features a large, vibrant display with a colorful abstract wallpaper, and a unique keyboard layout with illuminated keys and symbols, including a digital numeric keypad integrated into the touchpad area. The chassis is slim and angular, with visible ventilation and multiple ports along the left side. The keyboard area is spacious, with a distinctive arrangement of keys and a secondary display or touch-sensitive area above the touchpad. The overall design is contemporary and professional, suitable for both work and creative tasks in urban environments.
description: A sleek, dark blue ASUS laptop with a vibrant display, illuminated keyboard, and a digital numeric keypad integrated into the touchpad. The design is modern and professional, with a prominent logo and multiple side ports.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the dark blue lid with a centered, metallic ASUS logo.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the slim profile, open screen, illuminated keyboard, and visible side ports.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the colorful screen, full keyboard with illuminated keys, and digital numeric keypad on the touchpad.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the open screen, keyboard, and additional side ports.
attribute_brand_logo: The ASUS logo is visible, centered on the back of the display lid, in a metallic finish with bold, blocky letters.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying a colorful abstract wallpaper.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard layout is QWERTY with illuminated keys, a function row, and a digital numeric keypad integrated into the touchpad. Special symbols and shortcut icons are visible.
